entries.title: Sermon 78 on the NT
entries.excerpt: [CXXVIII. Ben.] On the words of the Gospel, John 5:31 ,If I bear witness of myself, etc.; and on the words of the apostle, Galatians 5:16 , Walk by the spirit, and you shall not fulfil the lust of the flesh. For the flesh lusts, etc. We have heard the words of the holy Gospel; and this that the Lord Jesus says, If I bear witness of Myself, My witness is not true, may perplex some. How then is not the witness of the Truth true? Is it not Himself who has said, I am the Way, and the Truth, and the Life? Whom then are we to believe, if we must not believe the Truth? For of a surety he is minded…
